zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mauleverer IV於1412年出生在英國越可爾牛頓時，他的父親William Mauleverer III33歲，母親Joan Colville33歲。他於1437年與Jane Conyers在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年8月10日在他的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mauleverer IV于1412年出生在英国越可爾牛頓时，他的父亲William Mauleverer III33岁，母亲Joan Colville33岁。他于1437年与Jane Conyers在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年8月10日在他的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mauleverer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal leverier ‘bad harrier’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mauleverer IV was born in 1412, in Newton, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Mauleverer III, was 33 and his mother, Joan Colville, was 33. He married Jane Conyers in 1437, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 10 August 1451, in his hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mauleverer IV est né en 1412, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Mauleverer III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Colville, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Jane Conyers en 1437, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 août 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mauleverer IV 1412 in Newton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Mauleverer III 33 und seine Mutter Joan Colville 33. Er hat 1437 in England, United Kingdom Jane Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. August 1451 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mauleverer IV è nato il nel 1412 nel Newton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Mauleverer III, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Colville, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Jane Conyers nel 1437, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 10 agosto 1451, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mauleverer IVが1412年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンで生まれた時，父William Mauleverer IIIは33歳，母Joan Colvilleは33歳であった。1437年にイギリスイギリスでJane Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年8月10日に故郷で39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mauleverer IV(이)가 1412년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mauleverer III(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Colville(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jane Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 8월 10일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mauleverer IV nasceu em 1412, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mauleverer III, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Colville, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Conyers em 1437, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1451, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mauleverer IV родился в 1412 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Mauleverer III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Colville, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Conyers в 1437 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 10 августа 1451 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mauleverer IV nació en 1412, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mauleverer III, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Colville, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Jane Conyers en 1437, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1451, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
